rationale: Y independently verifies the exact mechanism the ground-truth inline comment relies on (both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts in StagePool), correctly concludes the fix is safe/complete, and lands on APPROVE — matching the actual LGTM/APPROVED outcome. X reaches the same technical understanding but then inflates a non-issue into a 'major' finding and an unsupported 'FOLLOW-UP REQUIRED' verdict, plus pads the review with speculative/low-value nits (None-guard theorizing, a comment-nit about return_dict), hurting precision and calibration despite strong per-comment actionability.
